title: Airbnb Inc Q3 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
text: The appointment of Ahmad Al-Dahle as Chief Technology Officer in January 2026, formerly responsible for Meta's Generative AI initiatives, cemented a shift toward rebuilding the platform around AI. Airbnb is moving away from anonymous, filter-driven search toward a highly personalized, conversational discovery model. Growth and Financial Performance: Airbnb reported a 10% year-over-year increase in revenue in Q3, achieved its highest ever adjusted EBITDA of over $2 billion, and gross booking value grew by 14% year over year. Nights and Seats Booked rose by nine percent. The company surpassed a significant threshold with over 2 billion guest arrivals in its history. Regulatory expansion into boutique and independent hotels marks a strategic shift beyond pure home-sharing. The Superhost program continues to drive quality with elite hosts earning significantly higher revenues. Services expansion includes offering local experiences and travel-related services, consolidating travel planning into a single interface. The company is scaling AI implementations across customer service and product discovery, with plans for voice capabilities.
